description: Upgrade the 'nginx-web' deployment in the 'staging' namespace to use the container image 'nginx:1.26-alpine' (currently running 'nginx:1.25-alpine'). Ensure the rollout completes and all pods reflect the updated image. You are already logged in as admin and viewing the nginx-web deployment details in the Rancher UI. If prompted to log in, use Username: admin, Password: Admin12345678!.
